name: Jungfrau Region Skydiving from the airplane
description: Discover Jungfrau Region Skydiving from the airplane in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Jungfrau Region Skydiving from the airplane in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Skydiving
subcategory.description: Find and book the right skydive for you here. The ultimate adrenaline kick you get without a doubt during the free fall. You jump in a tandem jump from a height of three to four kilometers into nothingness and you don't even need any training. Hotspots for skydiving are Interlaken, Reichenbach, Lucerne, Zurich and Lugano. You can jump either from a helicopter or from a plane.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Skydive Interlaken: Tandem jump with views of the Alps, perfect activity for adventurers.
Skydiving in Reichenbach: Experience the thrill of free fall over the Alps.
Skydive Interlaken: Experience the free fall over breathtaking mountains in summer.
Skydive Interlaken: Experience free fall with an experienced guide in the nature of Interlaken.
Skydive Interlaken: Experience the free fall while skydiving over the Alps.
Skydiving Reichenbach: experience free fall over the majestic alpine landscapes
